title: OpenAI Expands ChatGPT Parent Notification: Teen Violence Violations Will Trigger Alerts
excerpt: OpenAI announced the expansion of the ChatGPT parent notification feature, so that parents and guardians with linked accounts will receive alerts when minor use
content_html:
OpenAI announced the expansion of the ChatGPT parent notification feature, so that parents and guardians with linked accounts will receive alerts when minor users are banned for violating policies on violence threats or cyberbullying.

Previously, OpenAI introduced a parental control feature, allowing parents to link their children's accounts, set usage limits, reduce sensitive content, and send warnings when self-harm risks are detected. After this upgrade, the system will further cover risky behaviors that may harm others.

This feature was developed by OpenAI together with the cyberbullying monitoring organization Moonshot. Moonshot stated that timely notification to parents when serious risks arise helps families intervene early and take measures.

OpenAI's enhanced security mechanisms are also related to controversies over AI use risks. An investigation into a 2025 shooting incident in Canada found that the suspect had used ChatGPT, and OpenAI subsequently committed to strengthening security measures.

Additionally, OpenAI has added a "Learning Mode" to the parental control page, guiding students to think through prompts rather than providing direct answers; for teenagers who use ChatGPT for long periods, the system will also add rest reminders.

As AI assistants enter scenarios such as education, ensuring safe use by minors has become a key issue in the industry. OpenAI is enhancing the safety of AI products through regulatory tools and interaction design.

blocks.html_en: Additionally, OpenAI has added a "Learning Mode" to the parental control page, guiding students to think through prompts rather than providing direct answers; for teenagers who use ChatGPT for long periods, the system will also add rest reminders.

sentences.en: Additionally, OpenAI has added a "Learning Mode" to the parental control page, guiding students to think through prompts rather than providing direct answers; for teenagers who use ChatGPT for long periods, the system will also add rest reminders.

sentences.en: OpenAI is enhancing the safety of AI products through regulatory tools and interaction design.

content_html_zh:
OpenAI 宣布扩展 ChatGPT 家长通知功能，以便当未成年人用户因违反暴力威胁或网络欺凌政策而被禁止时，拥有关联帐户的家长和监护人将收到警报。

此前，OpenAI推出了家长控制功能，允许家长链接孩子的账户、设置使用限制、减少敏感内容，并在检测到自残风险时发送警告。 此次升级后，系统将进一步覆盖可能危害他人的危险行为。

该功能由 OpenAI 与网络欺凌监控组织 Moonshot 共同开发。 Moonshot表示，当出现严重风险时及时通知家长，有助于家庭及早干预并采取措施。

OpenAI增强的安全机制也与AI使用风险的争议有关。 对 2025 年加拿大枪击事件的调查发现嫌疑人使用了 ChatGPT，OpenAI 随后承诺加强安全措施。

此外，OpenAI还在家长控制页面添加了“学习模式”，引导学生通过提示进行思考，而不是直接提供答案；对于长期使用ChatGPT的青少年，系统还会添加休息提醒。

随着AI助手进入教育等场景，确保未成年人安全使用成为行业的关键问题。 OpenAI 正在通过监管工具和交互设计来增强人工智能产品的安全性。
